canonical_definition: An omnidirectional RAG benchmark in the financial domain that evaluates systems across 16 topics and 5 tasks using both rule-based and LLM-based metrics on auto-generated and human-annotated datasets.
papers: A Multi-Agent Framework with Automated Decision Rule Optimization for Cross-Domain Misinformation Detection

definitions.text: An omnidirectional RAG benchmark in the financial domain that evaluates systems across 16 topics and 5 tasks using both rule-based and LLM-based metrics on auto-generated and human-annotated datasets.
definitions.paper: A Multi-Agent Framework with Automated Decision Rule Optimization for Cross-Domain Misinformation Detection

characterization: An omnidirectional RAG benchmark in the financial domain that evaluates systems across 16 topics and 5 tasks using both rule-based and LLM-based metrics on auto-generated and human-annotated datasets.

emnlp25: A Multi-Agent Framework with Automated Decision Rule Optimization for Cross-Domain Misinformation Detection
